name: Mac Jones
headline: Purdy's backup whose 2025 spot starts proved genuinely playable
body:
Jones spent 2025 as San Francisco's contingency and quietly delivered his cleanest tape in years: 11 games, a 69.6 completion rate, 13 touchdowns against 6 picks, and a positive 0.096 EPA per play with a 50.4 success rate. Both numbers flipped from his 2024 Jacksonville stint, where he posted negative EPA and a 42.4 success rate. A 3.7 CPOE and 79.1 on-target rate say the efficiency was real, not noise, even if the 5.9 air yards per completion confirms a short, controlled passing diet.

The catch is opportunity. He sits behind Brock Purdy again, so standalone value is roughly nil at a #311 overall draft cost. But the upside is concrete: filling in for an injured Purdy in 2025, Jones cleared 19.8 fantasy points in five of eight starts. A current shoulder issue limited him in OTAs, though he should be ready for camp. Stash-and-monitor only.
